pi_items.source: Confirmed by analyzing setup_task.sh which explicitly creates this directory by copying an ExampleProject.
Confirmed by analyzing setup_task.sh which dynamically generates the stakeholder review CSV and saves it to this path.
Confirmed by analyzing setup_task.sh which generates this file to store the expected status and priority of randomly modified requirements.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic drone project located at /home/ga/Documents/ReqView/Drone_Project, copied from a base ExampleProject. A stakeholder review CSV containing randomly selected requirement IDs and their updated statuses and priorities is dynamically generated at /home/ga/Documents/ReqView/Stakeholder_Review.csv. The corresponding ground truth mapping of correct updates is written to /home/ga/.hidden/ground_truth.json for later evaluation.
